header_limitations: Expected headers include configuration, marker, profiler timing, and TEXT_SIZE columns. Hardware-counter columns remain runtime-derived; std timing columns are expected when run_count > 1.

example_case.matmul_config: MatmulConfig(tile_dimensions=TileDimensions(in0_dimensions=[32, 32], in1_dimensions=(32, 32), output_dimensions=(32, 32), rt_dim=1, ct_dim=1, kt_dim=1, tile_cnt=1, tile_cnt_in0=1, tile_cnt_in1=1, output_tile_cnt=1, in0_tile_r_dim=1, in0_tile_c_dim=32, in1_tile_r_dim=32, in1_tile_c_dim=32), face_layout_config=FaceLayoutConfig(unpack_transpose_faces=<Transpose.No: False>, unpack_transpose_within_face=<Transpose.No: False>, num_faces_in0=2, num_faces_in1=4, num_faces=2, partial_face_in0=True, partial_face_in1=False, partial_face_math=True, partial_face_pack=True), formats=InputOutputFormat[A:Bfp8_b,B:Bfp8_b,out:Bfp8_b], stochastic_rnd=<StochasticRounding.No: 'StochRndType::None'>, dst_index=0, dest_sync=<DestSync.Half: 'SyncHalf'>, dest_acc=<DestAccumulation.No: False>)

runtime_skip_reasons.reason: Prevent mixing INT and FP in math transpose
Unsupported config transpose_of_faces = false and is_32bit = false
Dest accumulation must be enabled for this format
Local perf sweep only uses 1x4, 2x4, and 1x8 blocked-pack patterns
Pack Untilize does not support mixing Int32 with other formats
Pack Untilize does not support Bfp8_b output
Bfp8_b input not supported for unpack_tilize
Skipping test for unpack_transpose_faces=False and unpack_transpose_within_face=False
Bfp8_b -> Int32 conversion not supported (packer limitation)
Float16 -> Int32 conversion not supported (packer limitation)
Int32 -> Bfp8_b conversion not supported (unpacker limitation)
Int32 -> Float16 conversion not supported (unpacker limitation)
